figures.caption: Figure 2: Empirical gold retention rate vs. the target 1 − α across five datasets on adaptive RAG and ReAct for retrieval calibration. All models maintain coverage at or above the 1 − α guarantee for all tested error rates.

Table 1: Average number of retrieval turns (Avg #Turns), prediction set size, and composite objective across five datasets, averaged over all α values. Bold indicates the best result per row. Lower is better for all metrics. w/o ES means no early stop.

Figure 3: Empirical coverage rate vs. the target 1 − α across five datasets on adaptive RAG and ReAct for the final prediction set. All models maintain coverage at or above the 1 − α guarantee for all tested error rates.
